subject: [PATCH 4/8] mm: memcontrol: track MEMCG_KMEM per NUMA node

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch removes the MEMCG_KMEM tracking and instead introduces per-node obj_cgroup objects to track slab and kmem statistics for each NUMA node. The goal is to enable proper per-memcg-per-node accounting, which will be implemented in subsequent patches. Currently, this patch only sets up the necessary infrastructure without converting existing users of MEMCG_KMEM.

reviews.author: Alexandre Ghiti (author)
reviews.summary: Author is seeking clarification on what currently ensures the lifetime of an object cgroup returned by current_obj_cgroup(), indicating a need for further review.
reviews.raw_body:
Sashiko raised the same question, so I need to be educated here: what 
currently guarantees the life objcg returned by current_obj_cgroup()?
